body.title: CLOSED: Add gated consequence-check ticket to /decided for M/L/XL decisions
body.result: Step 5.5 added to /decided skill: M/L/XL decisions auto-draft gated consequence-check ticket with 14-day gate, predicted effects, and signals-to-watch
body.description:
When /decided closes a decision that includes M/L/XL tickets or touches MEDIUM+ inertia files, it should auto-draft a gated consequence-check follow-on ticket. The consequence ticket carries: (a) predicted unintended effects from the pre-mortem pass, (b) what signals to look for, (c) a gate condition (date or observable event). When the gate clears, the ticket surfaces as actionable-for-Akien for close or escalation. No consequence ticket for S-only/LOW-inertia decisions.

**Affected files:** `/home/akien/.claude/skills/decided` (skill file — LOW inertia)
**Design rules:** skill files are flat-file; no DB writes at skill-edit time; gate field is a ticket ID or date string (existing schema)
**Scope boundary:** /decided skill only. No cc_queue.py schema changes. Consequence ticket uses existing ticket shape — no new fields. S-only/LOW-inertia decisions skip the step.
**Test plan:** Run /decided on a test decision with an M-size ticket; verify a consequence ticket appears in queue with gate set to a date/condition; verify its description names predicted effects. Run on S-only decision; verify no consequence ticket filed.
